headline: Stop the snacking spiral. Today you change direction.
summary: You're gaining 0.05 kg/week when you need to lose 0.71 kg/week—and today is your weakest day; choose discipline over emotion.
details: Today: eat only portioned Huel meals or prepared vegan food—no snacking, no extras. Hit the rowing machine or treadmill for 45 minutes. Why: Sunday is when you typically lose control; every day you don't rebuild that control, you fall 0.76 kg further behind your 2027 goal.
